Dice Mastery.name: Rune of Choosing
Dice Mastery.effect: Unlock the Wild die face in your face pool (replaces one face on chosen die).

Dice Mastery.name: Steady Hand
Dice Mastery.effect: +1 reroll per round (4 total instead of 3).

Dice Mastery.name: Frozen Fate
Dice Mastery.effect: Once per match, 'freeze' one die across rounds (it keeps its face).

Dice Mastery.name: Thief's Trick
Dice Mastery.effect: Once per match, swap one of your dice with one of opponent's after final roll.

God Power Mastery.name: Priestly Tithe
God Power Mastery.effect: All God Powers cost 1 fewer token at Tier 1 only.

God Power Mastery.name: Patron God
God Power Mastery.effect: Choose one God Power. Its effects are +1 at all tiers.

God Power Mastery.name: Blessed Ascent
God Power Mastery.effect: Once per match, activate a God Power one tier higher than paid for.

God Power Mastery.name: Echo of the Gods
God Power Mastery.effect: When your God Power is countered (Frigg's Veil), refund 25% of tokens.

God Power Mastery.name: Fourth Oath
God Power Mastery.effect: Bring 4 God Powers to matches instead of 3.

Economy.name: Lucky Doubles
Economy.effect: Rolling doubles (bordered hand pair) generates +1 token.

Economy.name: Desperate Plea
Economy.effect: If you end a round with 0 tokens, gain 2 at start of next round.

Economy.name: Master Thief
Economy.effect: 25% chance (PRD) for Tithing Hands to steal 2 tokens instead of 1.

Economy.name: Alchemy
Economy.effect: Once per match, convert 5 tokens into 2 HP.

Resilience.name: Hardy Stock
Resilience.effect: Start with +1 HP (16 total in PvE).

Resilience.name: Pain Response
Resilience.effect: When you lose 3+ HP in a round, gain 2 tokens.

Resilience.name: Unbroken Defense
Resilience.effect: Unused defense dice (no attack to block) grant 1 token each at round end.

Resilience.name: Absolute Barrier
Resilience.effect: Once per match, negate all damage from a resolution phase (costs all your tokens).

Resilience.name: Second Wind
Resilience.effect: When reduced to 0 HP in PvE, survive with 1 HP (once per run).
